mapper.select: SELECT id, agent_id, user_id, message_id, message_json, status, session_id, create_time FROM chat_memory WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY create_time ASC
SELECT id, agent_id, user_id, message_id, message_json, status, session_id, create_time FROM chat_memory WHERE agent_id = #{agentId} AND user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time ASC

SELECT id, agent_id, user_id, message_id, message_json, status, session_id, create_time FROM chat_memory WHERE agent_id = #{agentId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO chat_memory (agent_id, user_id, message_id, message_json, status, session_id, request_id, create_time) VALUES (#{agentId}, #{userId}, #{messageId}, #{messageJson}, 0, #{sessionId}, #{requestId}, #{createTime})
SELECT last_insert_rowid()
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM chat_memory WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND session_id = #{sessionId} AND message_id = #{messageId}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT session_id, user_id FROM chat_memory_obsolete
SELECT id, agent_id, user_id, message_id, message_json, status, session_id, create_time FROM chat_memory_obsolete WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time ASC
